platform: xAI Responses API and Grok custom connectors

responses_api_tool.server_description: Use MVR relational-readiness preflight before recommending pre-MVP build, market entry, launch, pilot, investment, partnership, lending or BNPL, deployment, expansion, or scale in an African or high-context market. It checks market trust, permission, embeddedness, stakeholder readiness, and evidence gaps; it never authorizes.

grok_com_operator_observation.host_model: not disclosed by the host UI
grok_com_operator_observation.scoring_boundary: These sequential pre/post product observations used different prompts and metadata revisions. They are evidence of a corrected selection failure, not a frozen-track selection rate or host leaderboard result.

approval_boundary: xAI does not currently support require_approval on its OpenAI-compatible remote-MCP path. The dedicated endpoint therefore exposes only five read-only tools, and the Responses API recipe also retains allowed_tools as defense in depth.
verification_boundary: The xAI Responses API remote-MCP path passed a controlled three-case Grok 4.5 canary. A Grok.com custom connector was installed, discovered all five tools, and executed mvr_first_call when explicitly requested. Its first natural-language Uganda BNPL case missed MVR and used web search; after selection metadata was corrected, a fresh supplier-finance BNPL prompt automatically called mvr_first_call and mvr_entity_resolve while using web research as complementary context. Mobile, Grok on X, catalogue placement, Business provisioning, general ordinary-chat selection rates, and the frozen 40-case observatory remain unverified or not run.
production_boundary: The endpoint is the public sandbox. Licensed production Streamable HTTP MCP is not yet public.
